    C

    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Gets a message from one of the input topics.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Receives a number and publishes number + 1.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Receives a message from one of the input topics and publishes x + y.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Called when a topic sends a message.
    callback(String, Message) - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Adds the callback request to the queue.
    clear() - Method in class graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
    Removes all Topics from the manager.
    close() - Method in class configs.BinOpAgent
    Disconnects this agent from its topics.
    close() - Method in interface configs.Config
     
    close() - Method in class configs.GenericConfig
    Closes all agents that were created by this config.
    close() - Method in class configs.IncAgent
    Disconnects this agent from all topics it used.
    close() - Method in class configs.PlusAgent
    Disconnects this agent from all topics it used.
    close() - Method in interface graph.Agent
    Closes the agent.
    close() - Method in class graph.ParallelAgent
    Closes this ParallelAgent.
    close() - Method in class server.MyHTTPServer
    Closes the server, all registered servlets and the worker pool.
    close() - Method in class servlets.ConfLoader
     
    close() - Method in class servlets.HtmlLoader
     
    close() - Method in interface servlets.Servlet
    Releases servlet resources.
    close() - Method in class servlets.TopicDisplayer
     
    Config - Interface in configs
    Interface for a configuration of agents and topics.
    configs - package configs
     
    ConfLoader - Class in servlets
    Servlet for /upload.
